scripts.preview:start: bun run build:v1 && bun run preview
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @qarows/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @qarows/application typecheck && bun run --filter @qarows/ui typecheck && bun run --filter @qarows/v1 typecheck && bun run --filter @qarows/v2 typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter @qarows/shared test && bun run --filter @qarows/application test && bun run --filter @qarows/v1 test && bun run --filter @qarows/v2 test
